project_type: CDK C# (.NET 8) serverless sleep audio pipeline on AWS
build_system: dotnet CLI + CDK CLI (npx cdk). .NET 9 is installed (project targets net8.0 with RollForward Major). Node 22 available. CDK CLI needs npm install.
test_framework: xUnit with Amazon.CDK.Assertions - tests in src/CdkBase.Tests/CdkBaseStackTest.cs
verification_instructions: 1. dotnet restore src/CdkBase.sln, 2. dotnet build src/CdkBase.sln, 3. dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln, 4. npm install -g aws-cdk && npx cdk synth
setup_instructions: 1. dotnet restore src/CdkBase.sln (installs NuGet packages), 2. npm install -g aws-cdk (for cdk synth)
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can access package registries. .NET 9 installed (targets net8.0 with RollForward). Node 22 available. No AWS credentials available for actual deployment.
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: write failing tests first, then implement minimal code. Use CDK Assertions (Template.FromStack, HasResourceProperties, ResourceCountIs). Follow architecture-first approach - update ARCHITECTURE.md after changes. Environment config via CDK context. Conventional commit messages.
key_patterns: Tests instantiate CdkBaseStack with new App(), get Template.FromStack(stack), then assert on CloudFormation resources. Tests use FindResources + JsonSerializer for detailed inspection, or HasResourceProperties for simple checks. Stack uses single CdkBaseStack class with all constructs. Program.cs creates the app and stack.
directory_structure: Root: cdk.json, README.md. src/CdkBase/ - main CDK app (CdkBaseStack.cs, Program.cs, lambda/process_audio/index.py). src/CdkBase.Tests/ - xUnit tests. docs/ - ARCHITECTURE.md, AGENT_GUIDELINES.md. .github/workflows/ - CI.
